name: 7q21_3_PEG10_imprint_SD
description: 7q21.3 region containing imprinted PEG10/SGCE locus and flanking SDs implicated in myoclonus-dystonia syndrome (SGCE deletions). Smaller SD blocks mediate rare deletions causing maternal-expressed gene loss-of-function.

architecture.internal_structure: Modest SD blocks (~20 kb each) flanking SGCE/PEG10 imprinted cluster; substrate for rare microdeletions.
